name: ASUS ProArt PA602 Wood Edition Mid-Tower Computer Case - Tempered Glass Panel - One-Stop PWM Fan Hub - 2x 200mm Front Fans - 140mm PWM Rear Fan - USB 3.2 Gen 2x2 Type C - 2x USB 3.2 Gen1 - 2x USB 2.0 - Fan Control Button (PA602/WOOD/BLK/TG)
shortName: ASUS ProArt PA602 Wood Edition Mid-Tower Computer Case - Tempered
description: A premium mid-tower case with wood edition design, tempered glass panel, and comprehensive fan hub for custom cooling setups.

specs.usb_ports: USB 3.2 Gen 2x2 Type-C, 2x USB 3.2 Gen1, 2x USB 2.0
